title: Plugin y connector ecosystem controlado
commands: python -m devpilot_core plugin dry-run --plugin local.docs.plugin --operation metadata --dry-run --json
tests: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_plugin_registry.py tests/test_sprint_93_documentation.py tests/test_schema_registry.py tests/test_release_changelog.py tests/test_phase_h_backlog_approval.py tests/test_advanced_evals.py tests/test_quality_gate.py -q
PYTHONPATH=src python -m devpilot_core plugin dry-run --plugin local.docs.plugin --operation metadata --dry-run --json
PYTHONPATH=src python -m devpilot_core eval run --suite plugin-ecosystem --json
PYTHONPATH=src python -m devpilot_core quality-gate run --profile ci --json
pass_criteria: Plugin Registry validates structurally and semantically.
Plugin loader dry-run emits trace evidence without loading arbitrary code.
Plugins remain deny-by-default with policy, permissions, owner, version and risk level.
No network, external API, shell, remote execution or source mutation is enabled.
block_criteria: Plugin execution or importable entrypoints are enabled.
Plugin permissions lack MIASI policy bindings.
Quality gate does not consume plugin ecosystem evals.
risks: Implemented-initial only; no real plugin runtime or sandbox execution.
Registry changes must be reviewed as code because permissions affect future extensibility.
No plugin signing, dependency isolation or marketplace governance yet.
